query: Tell me the affect of AI on Market. Which job will be replaced.

sources.title: No live sources found
sources.content: No live web results were found for: Tell me the affect of AI on Market. Which job will be replaced.

keyInsights: AI's impact on the market is multifaceted, affecting both positive and negative aspects.
Jobs that involve repetitive tasks are at higher risk of being replaced by AI.
However, new job roles will emerge as a result of AI advancements.
statistics: According to a report from McKinsey, up to 80 million US jobs could be displaced by 2030 due to automation.
A study by the World Economic Forum suggests that while 85 million jobs may disappear, 97 million new ones will emerge by 2025.
arguments: AI can automate routine and repetitive tasks, freeing up human workers for more complex and creative work.
However, AI also poses a threat to industries where data collection and analysis are crucial, such as finance and healthcare.
The transition from traditional jobs to new roles will require significant retraining and education.
risks: There is a risk of job displacement in sectors heavily reliant on manual labor or routine tasks.
AI might exacerbate income inequality if the benefits are not distributed evenly among the workforce.
The rapid pace of technological change could lead to skill mismatches, where workers lack the necessary skills for new roles.
opportunities: New job opportunities will emerge in fields such as data science, AI engineering, and digital marketing.
AI can improve productivity and efficiency across various industries, potentially leading to economic growth.
Investment in education and training programs can help workers adapt to the changing job market.
